verses.geez:
ወበእማንቱ ፡ መዋዕል ፡ አልቦሙ ፡ ንጉሠ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ወበእማንቱ ፡ መዋዕል ፡ የኀሥሡ ፡ ሎሙ ፡ ሕዝበ ፡ ዳን ፡ ርስተ
                  ፡ ኀበ ፡ ይነብሩ ፡ እስመ ፡ ኢረከቡ ፡ እስከ ፡ ይእቲ ፡ አሚር ፡ ርስተ ፡ በማእከለ ፡ ሕዝበ ፡ እስራኤል ።

translations.lxx: In those days there was no king in Israel; and in those days the tribe of Dan sought for itself an inheritance to inhabit, because no inheritance had fallen to it until that day in the midst of the tribes of the children of Israel.
translations.kjv: In those days there was no king in Israel: and in those days the tribe of the Danites sought them an inheritance to dwell in; for unto that day all their inheritance had not fallen unto them among the tribes of Israel.

verses.geez:
ወፈነው ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ ዳን ፡ እምነ ፡ ሕዝቦሙ ፡ ኀምስተ ፡ ዕደወ ፡ እምነ ፡ መክፈልቶሙ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ ኀይል ፡ እምነ ፡
                  ሰአራ ፡ ወአስታሖል ፡ ከመ ፡ ይርአይዋ ፡ ለምድር ፡ ወያእምርዋ ፡ ወይቤልዎሙ ፡ ሑሩ ፡ ርእዩ ፡ ለነ ፡ ምድረ ፡ ወበጽሑ ፡
                  ውስተ ፡ ደብረ ፡ ኤፍሬም ፡ ኀበ ፡ ቤተ ፡ ሚካ ፡ ወኀደሩ ፡ ህየ ፡ እሙንቱ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ቤተ ፡ ሚካ ።

translations.lxx: And the sons of Dan sent from their families five men of valour, from Saraa and from Esthaol, to spy out the land and to search it; and they said to them, Go and search out the land. And they came as far as the mount of Ephraim to the house of Michaias and they lodged there,
translations.kjv: And the children of Dan sent of their family five men from their coasts, men of valour, from Zorah, and from Eshtaol, to spy out the land, and to search it; and they said unto them, Go, search the land: who when they came to mount Ephraim, to the house of Micah, they lodged there.

verses.geez:
ወአእመርዎ ፡ ቃሎ ፡ ለውእቱ ፡ ወልድ ፡ ወሬዛ ፡ ሌዋዊ ፡ ወቦኡ ፡ ህየ ፡ ወይቤልዎ ፡ መኑ ፡ አምጽአከ ፡ ዝየ ፡
                  ወምንተ ፡ ትገብር ፡ በዝየ ፡ ወምንተ ፡ ብከ ፡ በዝየ ።

translations.lxx: in the house of Michaias, and they recognised the voice of the young man the Levite, and turned in thither; and said to him, Who brought thee in hither? and what doest thou in this place? and what hast thou here?
translations.kjv: When they were by the house of Micah, they knew the voice of the young man the Levite: and they turned in thither, and said unto him, Who brought thee hither? and what makest thou in this place? and what hast thou here?

verses.geez: ወይቤሎሙ ፡ ከመዝ ፡ ወከመዝ ፡ ረሰየኒ ፡ ሚካ ፡ ወዐሰበኒ ፡ ወኮንክዎ ፡ ካህነ ።

translations.lxx: And he said to them, Thus and thus did Michaias to me, and he hired me, and I became his priest.
translations.kjv: And he said unto them, Thus and thus dealeth Micah with me, and hath hired me, and I am his priest.

verses.geez: ወይቤልዎ ፡ ተሰአል ፡ ኀበ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ እመ ፡ ይሴርሐነ ፡ ፍኖተነ ፡ እንተ ፡ ነሐውር ፡ ውስቴታ ፡ ንሕነ ።

translations.lxx: And they said to him, Enquire now of God, and we shall know whether our way will prosper, on which we are going.
translations.kjv: And they said unto him, Ask counsel, we pray thee, of God, that we may know whether our way which we go shall be prosperous.

verses.geez: ወይቤሎሙ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ካህን ፡ ሑሩ ፡ በሰላም ፤ ይእቲ ፡ ፍኖትክሙ ፡ ቅድመ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ እንተ ፡ ባቲ ፡ ተሐውሩ ።

translations.lxx: And the priest said to them, Go in peace; your way in which ye go, is before the Lord.
translations.kjv: And the priest said unto them, Go in peace: before the LORD is your way wherein ye go.

verses.geez:
ወሖሩ ፡ እሙንቱ ፡ ዕደው ፡ ወበጽሑ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ሌሳ ፡ ወርእዩ ፡ ሕዝበ ፡ እለ ፡ ይነብሩ ፡ ውስቴታ ፡ ተአሚኖሙ ፡
                  ይነብሩ ፡ በሕገ ፡ ሲዶና ፡ ህዱኣን ፡ ወዕሩፋን ፡ እንዘ ፡ ይትአመኑ ፡ ወኢክህሉ ፡ ነቢበ ፡ ቃ[ል] ፡ ውስተ ፡ ምድ[ር] ፡
                  ርስተ ፡ መዝገብ ፡ እስመ ፡ ርሑቃን ፡ እሙንቱ ፡ እምነ ፡ ሲዶና ፡ ወአልቦሙ ፡ ተልሓፈ ፡ ምስለ ፡ ሶርያ ።

translations.lxx: And the five men went on, and came to Laisa; and they saw the people in the midst of it dwelling securely, at ease as is the manner of the Sidonians, and there is no one perverting or shaming a matter in the land, no heir extorting treasures; and they are far from the Sidonians, and they have no intercourse with any one.
translations.kjv: Then the five men departed, and came to Laish, and saw the people that were therein, how they dwelt careless, after the manner of the Zidonians, quiet and secure; and there was no magistrate in the land, that might put them to shame in any thing; and they were far from the Zidonians, and had no business with any man.

verses.geez:
ወገብኡ ፡ እልክቱ ፡ ኀምስቱ ፡ ዕደው ፡ ኀበ ፡ አኀዊሆሙ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ሶራሐ ፡ ወኤስታሖል ፡ ወይቤልዎሙ ፡ ምንት ፡
                  ያነብረክሙ ።

translations.lxx: And the five men came to their brethren to Saraa and Esthaol, and said to their brethren, Why sit ye here idle?
translations.kjv: And they came unto their brethren to Zorah and Eshtaol: and their brethren said unto them, What say ye?

verses.geez:
ተንሥኡ ፡ ወንሑር ፡ ላዕሌሃ ፡ እስመ ፡ ቦእናሃ ፡ ወአንሶሰውናሃ ፡ ለይእቲ ፡ ምድር ፡ እስከ ፡ አጽናፊሃ ፡ ወርኢነ ፡
                  ሕዝበ ፡ እለ ፡ ይነብሩ ፡ ውስቴታ ፡ በሕገ ፡ ሲዶና ፡ [ወርኁቃን ፡ እሙንቱ ፡ እምነ ፡ ሲዶና ፡] ወአልቦሙ ፡ ተልሓፈ ፡
                  ምስለ ፡ ሶርያ ፡ ወባሕቱ ፡ ተንሥኡ ፡ ወንዕረግ ፡ ላዕሌሆሙ ፡ እስመ ፡ ርኢናሃ ፡ ለይእቲ ፡ ምድር ፡ ሠናይት ፡ ጥቀ ፡
                  ወአንትሙሰ ፡ አርምሙ ፡ ወኢትትሀከዩ ፡ ሐዊረ ፡ ወበዊአ ፡ ከመ ፡ ትትዋረስዋ ፡ ለይእቲ ፡ ምድር ።

translations.lxx: And they said, Arise, and let us go up against them, for we have seen the land, and, behold, it is very good, yet ye are still: delay not to go, and to enter in to possess the land.
translations.kjv: And they said, Arise, that we may go up against them: for we have seen the land, and, behold, it is very good: and are ye still? be not slothful to go, and to enter to possess the land.

verses.geez:
ወእምከመ ፡ ቦእክሙ ፡ ትበጽሑ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ሕዝብ ፡ እለ ፡ ተአሚኖሙ ፡ ይነብሩ ፡ ወምድርኒ ፡ ረኃብ ፡ እስመ ፡ አግብአ ፡
                  እግዚአብሔር ፡ ውስተ ፡ አዴክሙ ፡ ብሔረ ፡ ዘአልቦ ፡ ዘይትኀጣእ ፡ እምነ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ቃል ፡ ዘተፈጥረ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ምድር ።

translations.lxx: And whensoever ye shall go, ye shall come in upon a people secure, and the land is extensive, for God has given it into your hand; a place where there is no want of anything that the earth affords.
translations.kjv: When ye go, ye shall come unto a people secure, and to a large land: for God hath given it into your hands; a place where there is no want of any thing that is in the earth.

verses.geez:
ወተንሥኡ ፡ እምነ ፡ ህየ ፡ አምነ ፡ ብሔረ ፡ ዳን ፡ እምነ ፡ ሰራሕ ፡ ወኤ[ስ]ታሖል ፡ ስድስቱ ፡ ምእት ፡ ብእሲ ፡
                  እ[ለ] ፡ ቅኑታኒሆሙ ፡ ይጸውሩ ፡ ንዋየ ፡ ሐቅሎሙ ።

translations.lxx: And there departed thence of the families of Dan, from Saraa and from Esthaol, six hundred men, girded with weapons of war.
translations.kjv: And there went from thence of the family of the Danites, out of Zorah and out of Eshtaol, six hundred men appointed with weapons of war.

verses.geez:
ወዐርጉ ፡ ወኀደሩ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ቀርያት[ያ]ርም ፡ ውስተ ፡ ይሁዳ ፡ ወበእንተ ፡ ዝንቱ ፡ ተሰምየ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ መካን ፡
                  ትዕይንተ ፡ ዳን ፡ እስከ ፡ ዮም ፡ መንገለ ፡ ድኅሬሃ ፡ ለቀርያትያርም ።

translations.lxx: And they went up, and encamped in Cariathiarim in Juda; therefore it was called in that place the camp of Dan, until this day: behold, it is behind Cariathiarim.
translations.kjv: And they went up, and pitched in Kirjathjearim, in Judah: wherefore they called that place Mahanehdan unto this day: behold, it is behind Kirjathjearim.

verses.geez: ወኀሊፎሙ ፡ እምህየ ፡ በጽሑ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ደብረ ፡ ኤፍሬም ፡ ወመጽኡ ፡ እስከ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ቤተ ፡ ሚካ ።

translations.lxx: And they went on thence to the mount of Ephraim, and came to the house of Michaias.
translations.kjv: And they passed thence unto mount Ephraim, and came unto the house of Micah.

verses.geez:
ወይቤልዎሙ ፡ እልክቱ ፡ ኀምስቱ ፡ ዕደው ፡ እለ ፡ ሖሩ ፡ ከመ ፡ ይርአይዋ ፡ ለይእቲ ፡ ምድረ ፡ ሌሳ ፡ ወይቤልዎሙ ፡
                  ለአኀዊሆሙ ፡ ሶበ ፡ ታአምሩ ፡ ከመ ፡ ቦቱ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ዝንቱ ፡ አብያት ፡ ምስለ ፡ ወቴራፍን ፡ ወግልፎ ፡ ወስብኮ ፡
                  ወይእዜኒ ፡ አእምሩ ፡ ዘትገብሩ ።

translations.lxx: And the five men who went to spy out the land of Laisa answered, and said to their brethren, Ye know that there is in this place an ephod, and theraphin, and a graven and a molten image; and now consider what ye shall do.
translations.kjv: Then answered the five men that went to spy out the country of Laish, and said unto their brethren, Do ye know that there is in these houses an ephod, and teraphim, and a graven image, and a molten image? now therefore consider what ye have to do.

verses.geez: ወገሐሡ ፡ ህየ ፡ ወቦኡ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ቤቱ ፡ ለውእቱ ፡ ወልድ ፡ ሌዋዊ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ቤተ ፡ ሚካ ።

translations.lxx: And they turned aside there, and went into the house of the young man, the Levite, even into the house of Michaias, and asked him how he was.
translations.kjv: And they turned thitherward, and came to the house of the young man the Levite, even unto the house of Micah, and saluted him.

verses.geez:
ወተአምኅዎ ፡ እልክቱ ፡ ስድስቱ ፡ ምእት ፡ ብእሲ ፡ እንዘ ፡ ይጸውሩ ፡ ንዋየ ፡ ሐቅሎሙ ፡ ቅኑታኒሆሙ ፡ ወተጋብኡ ፡
                  ኀበ ፡ ኆኅተ ፡ አንቀጽ ፡ እለ ፡ እምነ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ ዳን ።

translations.lxx: And the six hundred men of the sons of Dan who were girded with their weapons of war stood by the door of the gate.
translations.kjv: And the six hundred men appointed with their weapons of war, which were of the children of Dan, stood by the entering of the gate.

verses.geez:
ወዐርጉ ፡ እልክቱ ፡ ኀምስቱ ፡ ዕደው ፡ እለ ፡ ሖሩ ፡ ቀዲሙ ፡ ከመ ፡ ይርአዩ ፡ ምድረ ፡ ወቦኡ ፡ ህየ ፡ ወነሥኡ ፡
                  ዝክተ ፡ ምስለ ፡ ወግልፎ ፡ ወቴራፍን ፡ ወስብኮ ፡ ወዝክቱሰ ፡ ካህን ፡ ይቀውም ፡ ኀበ ፡ ኆኅተ ፡ አንቀጽ ፡ ወእልክቱኒ ፡
                  ፯፻ብእሲ ፡ ይጸውሩ ፡ ንዋየ ፡ ሐቅሎሙ ፡ ቅኑታኒሆሙ ።

translations.lxx: And the five men who went to spy out the land went up, and entered into the house of Michaias, and the priest stood.
translations.kjv: And the five men that went to spy out the land went up, and came in thither, and took the graven image, and the ephod, and the teraphim, and the molten image: and the priest stood in the entering of the gate with the six hundred men that were appointed with weapons of war.

verses.geez:
ወቦኡ ፡ እሙንቱ ፡ ዕደው ፡ ውስተ ፡ ቤተ ፡ ሚካ ፡ ወነሥኡ ፡ ዝክተ ፡ ግልፎ ፡ ወምስለ ፡ ወቴራፍን ፡ ወስብኮ ፡
                  ወይቤሎሙ ፡ ዝክቱ ፡ ካህን ፡ ምንተ ፡ ትገብሩ ፡ አንትሙ ።

translations.lxx: And they took the graven image, and the ephod, and the theraphin, and the molten image; and the priest said to them, What are ye doing?
translations.kjv: And these went into Micah’s house, and fetched the carved image, the ephod, and the teraphim, and the molten image. Then said the priest unto them, What do ye?

verses.geez:
ወይቤልዎ ፡ አርምም ፡ ወደይ ፡ እዴከ ፡ ውስተ ፡ አፉከ ፡ ወነዓ ፡ ምስሌነ ፡ ወትከውነነ ፡ አቡነ ፡ ወካህነ ፡ ቦኑ ፡
                  ይኄይሰከ ፡ ትኩን ፡ ካህነ ፡ ለአሐዱ ፡ ብእሲ ፡ እምነ ፡ ትኩን ፡ ካህነ ፡ ለነገድ ፡ ወለሕዝበ ፡ እስራኤል ።

translations.lxx: And they said to him, Be silent, lay thine hand upon thy mouth, and come with us, and be to us a father and a priest: is it better for thee to be the priest of the house of one man, or to be the priest of a tribe and house for a family of Israel?
translations.kjv: And they said unto him, Hold thy peace, lay thine hand upon thy mouth, and go with us, and be to us a father and a priest: is it better for thee to be a priest unto the house of one man, or that thou be a priest unto a tribe and a family in Israel?

verses.geez:
ወተፈሥሐ ፡ ልቡ ፡ ለውእቱ ፡ ካህን ፡ ወነሥአ ፡ ውእተ ፡ ምስለ ፡ ወቴራፍን ፡ ወግልፎ ፡ ወስብኮ ፡ ወቦአ ፡ ማእከለ ፡
                  ሕዝብ ።

translations.lxx: And the heart of the priest was glad, and he took the ephod, and the theraphin, and the graven image, and the molten image, and went in the midst of the people.
translations.kjv: And the priest’s heart was glad, and he took the ephod, and the teraphim, and the graven image, and went in the midst of the people.

verses.geez: ወተመይጡ ፡ ወሖሩ ፡ ወነሥኡ ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ቤቶ ፡ ወጥሪቶ ፡ ዘክብሩ ፡ ወነድኡ ፡ ቅድሜሆሙ ።

translations.lxx: So they turned and departed, and put their children and their property and their baggage before them.
translations.kjv: So they turned and departed, and put the little ones and the cattle and the carriage before them.

verses.geez:
ወእንበለ ፡ ይርሐቁ ፡ እምነ ፡ ቤት ፡ መጽአ ፡ ሚካ ፡ ወዕደው ፡ ሕዝብ ፡ እለ ፡ ቅሩበ ፡ ቤቱ ፡ ለሚካ ፡ ወጸርኁ ፡
                  እምድኅሬሆሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ ዳን ፡ ወአውየዉ ፡ ሎሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ ዳን ።

translations.lxx: They went some distance from the house of Michaias, and, behold, Michaias and the men in the houses near Michaias' house, cried out, and overtook the children of Dan.
translations.kjv: And when they were a good way from the house of Micah, the men that were in the houses near to Micah’s house were gathered together, and overtook the children of Dan.

verses.geez: ወተመይጡ ፡ ገጾሙ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ ዳን ፡ ወይቤልዎ ፡ ለሚካ ፡ ምንተ ፡ ኮንከ ፡ ዘትጸርኅ ።

translations.lxx: And the children of Dan turned their face, and said to Michaias, What is the matter with thee that thou hast cried out?
translations.kjv: And they cried unto the children of Dan. And they turned their faces, and said unto Micah, What aileth thee, that thou comest with such a company?

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎሙ ፡ ሚካ ፡ ግልፎየ ፡ ዘገበርኩ ፡ ነሣእክሙኒ ፡ ወካህን[የ]ኒ ፡ ወሖርክሙ ፡ ወምንተ ፡ እንከ ፡ ኀደግሙ ፡ ሊተ
                  ፡ ወትብሉኒ ፡ ምንተ ፡ ትጸርኅ ።

translations.lxx: And Michaias said, Because ye have taken my graven image which I made, and my priest, and are gone; and what have I remaining? and what is this that ye say to me, Why criest thou?
translations.kjv: And he said, Ye have taken away my gods which I made, and the priest, and ye are gone away: and what have I more? and what is this that ye say unto me, What aileth thee?

verses.geez:
ወይቤልዎ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ ዳን ፡ ኢይሰማዕ ፡ እንከ ፡ ቃልከ ፡ ምስሌነ ፡ ወእመአኮሰ ፡ ይትራከቡከ ፡ ዕደው ፡ መሪራነ ፡
                  ነፍስ ፡ ወተሐጕል ፡ ዓዲ ፡ ነፍስከ ፡ ወነፍሰ ፡ ቤትከ ።

translations.lxx: And the children of Dan said to him, Let not thy voice be heard with us, lest angry men run upon thee, and take away thy life, and the lives of thy house.
translations.kjv: And the children of Dan said unto him, Let not thy voice be heard among us, lest angry fellows run upon thee, and thou lose thy life, with the lives of thy household.

verses.geez: ወሖሩ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ ዳን ፡ ፍኖቶሙ ፡ ወርእየ ፡ [ሚካ ፡] ከመ ፡ ይጸንዕዎ ፡ ወተመይጠ ፡ ወአተወ ፡ ቤቶ ።

translations.lxx: And the children of Dan went their way; and Michaias saw that they were stronger than himself, and he returned to his house.
translations.kjv: And the children of Dan went their way: and when Micah saw that they were too strong for him, he turned and went back unto his house.

verses.geez:
ወእሙንቱሰ ፡ ነሥኡ ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ዘገብረ ፡ ሚካ ፡ ወካህነኒ ፡ ወኵሎ ፡ ዘቦ ፡ ወሖሩ ፡ እስከ ፡ ሌሳ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ ሕዝብ ፡
                  ዕሩፍ ፡ ዘተአሚኖ ፡ ይነብር ፡ ወቀተልዎሙ ፡ በአፈ ፡ ኀፂን ፡ ወሀገሮሙኒ ፡ አውዐዩ ።

translations.lxx: And the children of Dan took what Michaias had made, and the priest that he had, and they came to Laisa, to a people quiet and secure; and they smote them with the edge of the sword, and burnt the city with fire.
translations.kjv: And they took the things which Micah had made, and the priest which he had, and came unto Laish, unto a people that were at quiet and secure: and they smote them with the edge of the sword, and burnt the city with fire.

verses.geez:
ወአልቦ ፡ ዘድኅነ ፡ እስመ ፡ ርኁቃን ፡ እሙንቱ ፡ እምነ ፡ ሲዶና ፡ ወአልቦሙ ፡ ተልሓፈ ፡ ምስለ ፡ ባዕድ ፡ ሰብእ ፡
                  ወይእቲሰ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ቈላት ፡ እንተ ፡ ቤተ ፡ ጦብ ፡ ወሐነጽዋ ፡ ለይእቲ ፡ ሀገር ፡ ወነበሩ ፡ ውስቴታ ።

translations.lxx: And there was no deliverer, because the city is far from the Sidonians, and they have no intercourse with men, and it is in the valley of the house of Raab; and they built the city, and dwelt in it.
translations.kjv: And there was no deliverer, because it was far from Zidon, and they had no business with any man; and it was in the valley that lieth by Bethrehob. And they built a city, and dwelt therein.

verses.geez:
ወሰመዩ ፡ ስማ ፡ ለይእቲ ፡ ሀገር ፡ ዳን ፡ በስመ ፡ አቡሆሙ ፡ ዳን ፡ ዘተወልደ ፡ ለእስራኤል ፡ ወስማሰ ፡ ለይእቲ ፡
                  ሀገር ፡ ቀዲሙ ፡ [ሌሳ] ።

translations.lxx: And they called the name of the city Dan, after the name of Dan their father, who was born to Israel; and the name of the city was Ulamais before.
translations.kjv: And they called the name of the city Dan, after the name of Dan their father, who was born unto Israel: howbeit the name of the city was Laish at the first.

verses.geez:
ወአቀሙ ፡ ሎሙ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ ዳን ፡ ግልፎ ፡ ዘሚካ ፡ ወዮናታን ፡ ወልደ ፡ ጌርሶም ፡ ወልደ ፡ ምናሴ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ወደቂቁ
                  ፡ ካህናት ፡ እሙንቱ ፡ ለሕዝበ ፡ ዳን ፡ እስከ ፡ አመ ፡ ፈለሰት ፡ ምድሮሙ ።

translations.lxx: And the children of Dan set up the graven image for themselves; and Jonathan son of Gerson son of Manasse, he and his sons were priests to the tribe of Dan till the time of the carrying away of the nation.
translations.kjv: And the children of Dan set up the graven image: and Jonathan, the son of Gershom, the son of Manasseh, he and his sons were priests to the tribe of Dan until the day of the captivity of the land.

verses.geez:
ወአቀሙ ፡ ሎሙ ፡ ግልፎ ፡ ዘሚካ ፡ ዘገብረ ፡ በኵሉ ፡ መዋዕል ፡ አምጣነ ፡ ነበረ ፡ ቤተ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ውስተ ፡
                  ሴሎም ።

translations.lxx: And they set up for themselves the graven image which Michaias made, all the days that the house of God was in Selom; and it was so in those days that there was no king in Israel.
translations.kjv: And they set them up Micah’s graven image, which he made, all the time that the house of God was in Shiloh.
